connectorUiConfig.title: Utimaco Enterprise Secure Key Manager (ESKM)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The Utimaco ESKM connector ingests KMIP server logs from Utimaco Enterprise Secure Key Manager (ESKM) into Microsoft Sentinel.

Supports Basic authentication (username/password).

For more information, visit [Utimaco ESKM Documentation](https://utimaco.com/key-management/enterprise-secure-key-manager).

graphQueries.baseQuery: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

sampleQueries.description: All KMIP server events from the last 24 hours

sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize count() by Event | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Failed KMIP Client Operations with reason codes
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Result != 'SUCCESS' | summarize count() by Operation, Result, Reason | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Authentication failures by client IP and user
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Event == 'Authentication Failure' | summarize FailureCount = count() by IP, User | order by FailureCount desc
{{graphQueriesTableName}} | where isnotempty(Operation) | summarize count() by Operation, ObjectType | order by count_ desc

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Utimaco ESKM Account Credentials
customs.description: Utimaco ESKM account credentials (username and password) are required to authenticate to the ESKM management API. See [Utimaco ESKM Documentation](https://utimaco.com/key-management/enterprise-secure-key-manager).

instructionSteps.title: Step 1 - Prerequisites
instructionSteps.description: Ensure you have a Utimaco ESKM management account with permissions to access the management API. Note the base URL of your ESKM appliance (typically `https://<eskm-host>:8443`).

instructionSteps.title: Step 2 - Connect to Utimaco ESKM
instructionSteps.description: Provide your Utimaco ESKM management API base URL and account credentials below, then click Connect.
